title: Anthropic拒绝政府要求修复越狱模型
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Nathan Lambert
@natolambert
The Dario faction and the Sacks faction speak very different languages, and a Dario clarification could sound like a refusal.
This puts us very squarely in vibe governance. Models are released when the gov thinks its okay, and it is unlikely this is based on technical evals.
martin_casado
@martin_casado
14h
“The Admin asked Dario to fix the jailbreak or de-deploy the model. Dario refused.
— In their blog post, Anthropic defended its decision by saying the jailbreak isn’t serious. “
This is crazy. What are we even doing here?
7:31 PM · Jun 13, 2026 45.7K Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: Anthropic拒绝政府要求修复越狱模型
discovery_record.discovery_summary: 美国政府要求Anthropic的Dario修复模型越狱漏洞或下架模型，Dario拒绝。Anthropic博客声称越狱不严重。Nathan Lambert评论称Dario派系与Sacks派系立场迥异，Dario的澄清实际构成拒绝，使行业陷入"氛围治理"--模型发布由政治判断而非技术评估决定。

key_excerpts.text: 美国政府要求Anthropic的Dario修复模型越狱漏洞或下架模型，Dario拒绝。Anthropic博客声称越狱不严重。Nathan Lambert评论称Dario派系与Sacks派系立场迥异，Dario的澄清实际构成拒绝，使行业陷入"氛围治理"--模型发布由政治判断而非技术评估决定。
Post Log in Sign up Post Nathan Lambert @natolambert The Dario faction and the Sacks faction speak very different languages, and a Dario clarification could sound like a refusal.
This puts us very squarely in vibe governance.
Models are released when the gov thinks its okay, and it is unlikely this is based on technical evals.
martin_casado @martin_casado 14h “The Admin asked Dario to fix the jailbreak or de-deploy the model.
— In their blog post, Anthropic defended its decision by saying the jailbreak isn’t serious.
